name: Stir Fried Eggs and Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
---------------------------
SAUCE:
1/2 teaspoon Corn flour
1/2 tablespoon Soy sauce
1/4 cup Vegetable stock
1 teaspoon Sesame oil
1. Heat the vegetable oil in a large shallow pan.
Add the onion, garlic, and pepper.
Cook over gentle heat until the onion and pepper are softened.
2. Add the mushrooms, mung beans, and carrot to the pan.
Stir over medium heat for 2 minutes.
3. Beat the eggs and soy sauce together until completely combined.
Pour the egg mixture into the pan.
Cook, continuously stirring the mixture, until the eggs are just set.
4. To prepare the sauce, blend the corn flour, soy sauce, vegetable stock,
and sesame oil in a small pan.
Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the sauce boils
and thickens.
5. Serve a portion of egg mixture, accompanied by sauce and steamed rice.
